{{Quote|You heard our beloved slave master, everyone back in the shuttle.|Chas Uliar|<ref name="OF" />}}
'''Chas Uliar''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] crewman of the ''[[Outbound Flight]]'', born [[49 BBY/Legends|49 BBY]].

==Biography==
Uliar was recruited to the project at its start in [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]], when he'd just completed his school training. He held the rank-position of Reactor Tech 4.<ref name="OF" />

As the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], especially [[Jorus C'baoth]], took increasing control over all aspects of the ship, Uliar's resentment of the Jedi grew.<ref name="OF" />

Uliar survived the crash of ''[[Outbound Flight]]'' onto [[The Redoubt/Legends|the Redoubt]].<ref name="OF" /> Even moments after the crash, he began to suspect [[Dillian Pressor]] of being a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]]. Later on, he became a [[Director/Legends|Director]] of the colony, and due to his distaste of the Jedi, anyone he suspected of being Force-sensitive were first quarantined, then banished to ''[[Dreadnaught-Three]]'' if Force-sensitivity was confirmed. Uliar often rightly suspected Dillian's granddaughter [[Evlyn Tabory|Evlyn]] of being a Force-sensitive, but her mother [[Rosemari Pressor Tabory|Rosemari]] and her uncle [[Jorad Pressor|Jorad]] covered for her to prevent Uliar from sending her to D-Three.<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />

When the colonists of the wrecked ''Outbound Flight'' were relocated to the [[Empire of the Hand]] after the [[Battle of the Redoubt]], Uliar was one of the few who needed the most persuasion to go.<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />
